url.label: Mnemory Server URL
url.help: URL of the mnemory server (or use ${MNEMORY_URL})

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Bearer token for mnemory authentication (or use ${MNEMORY_API_KEY})

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Sent as X-User-Id header. Required when the API key is a wildcard or auth is disabled (or use ${MNEMORY_USER_ID})

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context before each agent turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract and store memories from conversations

scoreThreshold.label: Score Threshold
scoreThreshold.help: Minimum relevance score for recalled memories (0.0-1.0)

includeAssistant.label: Include Assistant Messages
includeAssistant.help: Send assistant messages to mnemory for extraction (not just user messages)

managed.label: Managed Mode
managed.help: Include mnemory behavioral instructions in the system prompt

agentPrefix.label: Agent ID Prefix
agentPrefix.help: Prefix for agent IDs sent to mnemory (e.g. 'openclaw' produces 'openclaw:main'). Set to empty string to disable prefixing (or use ${MNEMORY_AGENT_PREFIX})

timeout.label: Request Timeout (ms)
timeout.help: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds. Default: 60000 (60 seconds) (or use ${MNEMORY_TIMEOUT})
